description: A graphic styled as a screenshot of a Truth Social / X post from Donald J. Trump. On a white background sits a circular profile avatar of Trump's face rendered/overlaid with the American flag (stars and stripes), next to the bold name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verified checkmark and a dark Truth Social style badge icon, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The body is a large-type, all-text presidential statement in black sans-serif reading: 'Assuming Iran agrees to give what has been agreed to, which is, perhaps, a big assumption, the already legendary Epic Fury will be at an end, and the highly effective Blockade will allow the Hormuz Strait to be OPEN TO ALL, including Iran. If they don't agree, the bombing starts, and it will be, sadly, at a much higher level and intensity than it was before. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Assuming Iran agrees... the already legendary Epic Fury will be at an end... If they don't agree, the bombing starts, and it will be, sadly, at a much higher level and intensity than it was before. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP
